sourceSummary.oneLine: Quotation for X-RAY DETECTOR CE EMC and CB Safety documentation services.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Commercial quotation for regulatory testing/report issuance services, including CB copy report, CB approval certificate cost, and CE general report issuance.
keyPoints: Product name is X-RAY DETECTOR and model name is TBD.
Quoted services include CE EMC IEC 60601-1-2 (Ed. 4.1) and CB SAFETY IEC 60601-1 (Ed. 3.2).
Safety service states CB COPY report issuance for a U.S. manufacturer with no test.
EMC service states CE general report issuance with no test.
Quotation validity period is 30 days from issue date.

reviewFlags.reason: Authority or jurisdiction is ambiguous; CE and CB are referenced as service scopes, but no regulatory authority is named.
Product model metadata is not specified beyond 'TBD'.
OCR/order quality appears imperfect around 'Date Issued', 'Quotation No.', and recipient fields.
Document is a commercial quotation, not an approval certificate or official regulatory decision.
